User Name

Categories

Organize your notes by category

🏷️ Categories Overview

🏷️

No categories yet

Create some notes to see automatic categories

🤖 Auto-Categorization Rules

🚨 Urgent Suffix

Keywords urgent, asap, important add "-urgent" suffix

Time-urgent 0 notes
📅 Task Suffix

Keywords todo, task, remind add "-task" suffix

Time-task 0 notes
🤝 Meeting Suffix

Keywords meeting, call, appointment add "-meeting" suffix

Time-meeting 0 notes
💡 Idea Suffix

Keywords idea, thought, brainstorm add "-idea" suffix

Time-idea 0 notes
⏰ Time-Based Categories (Primary)

All notes are primarily categorized by creation time, with optional keyword suffixes

Morning (0-12h) Afternoon (12-17h) Evening (17-24h)

Examples: "morning", "afternoon-urgent", "evening-task", "morning-meeting"

📊 Category Statistics

No statistics available yet

🗂️ Browse by Category

🗂️

No categories to browse

Create some notes to see them organized by category

💡 Tips for Better Categorization

🎯
Use Keywords

Start your notes with keywords like "urgent", "todo", "meeting", or "idea" for automatic categorization.

⏰
Time-Based Organization

Notes without specific keywords are categorized by creation time: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening.

🎙️
Voice Recognition

Speak keywords naturally - "This is urgent" or "Meeting with team" will be categorized correctly.

🔍
Easy Searching

Use the search page to find notes by category, or click on category tags to filter notes.
